customHandlers.cctvListHandler: function(ctx) { const fetchJson = (url) => { let resp = req(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0' } }); return JSON.parse(resp.content); }; let filter = ctx.filter || {}; let url = `https://api.cntv.cn/lanmu/columnSearch?fl=${filter.fl || ''}&fc=${filter.fc || ''}&cid=${filter.cid || ''}&p=${ctx.pg}&n=20&serviceId=tvcctv&t=json`; let json = fetchJson(url); let docs = json?.response?.docs || []; let prefix = (filter.year || '') + (filter.month || ''); return docs.map(vod => ({ vod_id: `${prefix}###${vod.column_name}###${vod.lastVIDE?.videoSharedCode || '_'}###${vod.column_logo || ''}`, vod_name: vod.column_name, vod_pic: vod.column_logo || '', vod_remarks: '' })); }
customHandlers.cctvDetailHandler: function(ctx) { let parts = ctx.vodId.split('###'); if (parts.length < 4) return { list: [] }; let prefix = parts[0]; let title = parts[1]; let lastVideo = parts[2]; let logo = parts[3]; if (lastVideo === '_') return { list: [] }; let infoUrl = `https://api.cntv.cn/video/videoinfoByGuid?guid=${lastVideo}&serviceId=tvcctv`; let infoJson = JSON.parse(req(infoUrl, { json: true })); if (!infoJson.ctid) return { list: [] }; let topicId = infoJson.ctid; let channel = infoJson.channel || ''; let listUrl = `https://api.cntv.cn/NewVideo/getVideoListByColumn?id=${topicId}&d=${prefix}&p=1&n=100&sort=desc&mode=0&serviceId=tvcctv&t=json`; let listJson = JSON.parse(req(listUrl, { json: true })); let videoList = []; for (let video of (listJson?.data?.list || [])) { let playId = video.pid || video.vid || video.guid; if (playId) videoList.push(`${video.title}$${playId}`); } if (videoList.length === 0) return { list: [] }; let displayDate = prefix || new Date().getFullYear().toString(); let vod = { vod_id: ctx.vodId, vod_name: `${displayDate} ${title}`, vod_pic: logo, type_name: channel, vod_year: displayDate, vod_play_from: 'CCTV', vod_play_url: videoList.join('#') }; return { list: [vod] }; }
customHandlers.cctvPlayHandler: function(ctx) { let pid = ctx.id; let url = `https://vdn.apps.cntv.cn/api/getHttpVideoInfo.do?pid=${pid}`; let json = JSON.parse(req(url, { json: true })); let hls = json?.hls_url || ''; return { parse: 0, playUrl: '', url: hls }; }
